title: STOOD-X: Explainable Out-of-Distribution Detection via Nonparametric Statistical Testing on Large-Scale Datasets
description_es: Este trabajo presenta STOOD-X, un método para detectar muestras fuera de distribución de manera explicable usando pruebas estadísticas no paramétricas.
abstract: Out-of-distribution (OOD) detection is crucial for deploying robust machine learning systems. This paper introduces STOOD-X, a nonparametric statistical testing approach for OOD detection that provides explainability alongside high detection accuracy on large-scale datasets.

citations.apa: Sevillano-García, I., Luengo, J., & Herrera, F. (2026). STOOD-X: Explainable Out-of-Distribution Detection via Nonparametric Statistical Testing on Large-Scale Datasets. Pattern Recognition, 113254.
citations.mla: Sevillano-García, Iván, et al. "STOOD-X: Explainable Out-of-Distribution Detection via Nonparametric Statistical Testing on Large-Scale Datasets." Pattern Recognition, 2026, p. 113254.
